description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. Large rectangular windows line the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The house is two stories tall, with the upper floor containing multiple rooms, including a bedroom and a living area visible through the windows. The main entryway is marked by a prominent door and a small overhang, with no visible porch or steps. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, with a distinctive circular window on one side adding architectural interest. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass and wood accents.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. Features include a prominent entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and a distinctive circular window.
description_view_0: Front and partial side view showing large rectangular windows, the main entryway, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular window, arched windows, and the light-colored upper facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a focus on the flat roof and plain wall surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a secondary entry, and more of the dark exterior finish.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a distinctive circular window
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent single door with a small overhang, no porch or steps, minimal decorative elements
